detaileddescription.para: dummy file MODIFICATION HISTORY: Ver Who Date Changes 2.5 ms 04/18/17 Modified tcl file to add suffix U for XPAR_CPU_ID parameter of cpu_cortexa9 in xparameters.h 2.7 mus 07/03/18 Updated tcl to not to add default flags forcefully into

para.heading: extra compiler flags. Now, user can remove default flags
from extra compiler flags. It fixes CR#998768.
